arc.headline: Skyline status under public review
arc.brief: The tower's landmark credentials are being questioned in the press. The skyline charter isn't revoked — yet.
arc.successCondition: host two successful visits within 5 days

arc.headline: Landmark Rehabilitation
arc.brief: Prove the institution is worth its charter. Clean rooms, calm queues, one authored public outcome.
arc.successCondition: public trust ≥ 60 AND one praised visit

arc.headline: Skyline charter withdrawn
arc.brief: The tower is still operating but the skyline designation is gone. Re-earn it the long way.
arc.successCondition: reach 75 public trust AND 80 event readiness
